SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.settings

Class Configuration

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.Configuration
public class Configuration extends Object
A container to hold parsed configurations. Configurations are a mapping between property names and values plus additional meta-information (line number, documentation, etc.).

Helper functions allow to access the values in a type-safe fashion. Note that configurations may also be nested, use getTable(String) to receive a sub configuration.

    Writer for configurations.

  • Method Details

    • load

      public static Configuration load(Path file) throws IOException
      Loads a configuration using the given file.
      Parameters:
      file - existing file path
      Returns:
      a configuration based on the file contents
      Throws:
      IOException - if file does not exist or i/o error

    • load

      public static Configuration load(CharStream input) throws IOException
      Loads a configuration using the given char stream.
      Parameters:
      input - existing file path
      Returns:
      a configuration based on the file contents
      Throws:
      IOException - i/o error on the steram

    • exists

      public boolean exists(String name)
      Returns true if an entry for the given name exists.

    • exists

      public <T> boolean exists(String name, Class<T> clazz)
      Returns true if an entry for the given name exists and is also compatible with the given class.
      See Also:
      • getBool(String)
      • getInt(String)
      • getLong(String)
      • getDouble(String)
      • getTable(String)

    • get

      public <T> @Nullable T get(String name, Class<T> clazz)
      Returns the stored value for the given name casted to the given clazz if possible. If no value exists, or value is not compatible to clazz, null is returned.
      Type Parameters:
      T - an arbitrary class, exptected return type
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      clazz - data type because of missing reified generics.

    • get

      public <T> @NonNull T get(String name, Class<T> clazz, @NonNull T defaultValue)
      The same as get(String, Class) but returns the defaultValue instead of a null reference.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the expected return type compatible to the defaultValue
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      defaultValue - the returned instead of null.

    • get

      public @Nullable Object get(String name)
      Get the value for the entry named name. Null if no such entry exists.
      See Also:
      • exists(String)

    • getInt

      public int getInt(String name)
      Returns an integer from the configuration.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not a Long
      NullPointerException - if no such value entry exists

    • getInt

      public int getInt(String name, int defaultValue)
      Returns an integer value for the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not a Long
      NullPointerException - if no such value entry exists

    • getLong

      public long getLong(String name)
      Returns a long value for the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not a Long
      NullPointerException - if no such value entry exists

    • getLong

      public long getLong(String name, long defaultValue)
      Returns a long value for the given name. defaultValue if no such value is present.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not a Long

    • getBool

      public boolean getBool(String name)
      Returns a boolean value for the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not a Boolean
      NullPointerException - if no such value entry exists

    • getBool

      public boolean getBool(String name, boolean defaultValue)
      Returns a boolean value for the given name. defaultValue if no such value is present.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not a Boolean

    • getDouble

      public double getDouble(String name)
      Returns a double value for the given name. defaultValue if no such value is present.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not an Double
      NullPointerException - if no such value entry exists

    • getString

      public @Nullable String getString(String name)
      Returns a string value for the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not a String

    • getString

      public String getString(String name, String defaultValue)
      Returns a string value for the given name. defaultValue if no such value is present.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not an String

    • getTable

      public @Nullable Configuration getTable(String name)
      Returns a sub configuration for the given name. null if no such value is present.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not a Configuration

    • getList

      public @Nullable List<Object> getList(String name)
      Returns a list of objects for the given name. null if no such value is present.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not a List

    • getList

      public <T> @Nullable List<T> getList(String name, Class<T> clazz)
      Returns a list of elements for the given name. The class type for the elements is given by the clazz parameter. null if no such value is present.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      clazz - the class type of the elements
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the entry is not a List or contains elements of the wrong type

    • getStringList

      public @NonNull List<String> getStringList(String name)
      Returns a list of strings for the given name. In contrast to the other methods, this method does not throw an exception if the entry does not exist in the configuration. Instead, it returns an empty list.
      Parameters:
      name - property name
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the list contains non-strings

    • getStringArray

      public @NonNull String[] getStringArray(String name, @NonNull String[] defaultValue)
      Returns string array for the requested entry. defaultValue is returned if no such entry exists.
      Parameters:
      name - a string identifying the entry
      defaultValue - a default value
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the given entry has non-string elements

    • getEnum

      public <T extends Enum<T>> @NonNull T getEnum(String name, @NonNull T defaultValue)
      Interprets the given entry as an enum value.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the enum
      Parameters:
      name - a name identifying an entry
      defaultValue - the default value to be returned
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the given entry is not a string
      IllegalArgumentException - if defaultValue does not belong to an enum

    • getMeta

      public @Nullable Configuration.ConfigurationMeta getMeta(String name)
      Returns the meta data corresponding to the given entry.
